summary: Implementing dict-based dynamic default resolution for Option; will add validation right after existing super().__init__ call in Option.__init__ (should not touch your batch_size additions if you add those elsewhere in __init__), plus a small guard in types.convert_type. Will re-read file before each edit to avoid clobbering.
